featureCandidates.title: TicketBridge for MSPs
featureCandidates.summary: Email-to-ticket automation for MSP teams: triage, loop prevention, deduplication, and SLA-aware routing.
featureCandidates.icp: Managed Service Providers (10-100 employees) working across multiple ticketing systems

featureCandidates.title: ReportOps for Boutique Marketing Agencies
featureCandidates.summary: Automated weekly performance digests for 5-30 person agencies with data sync from Ads/Analytics/CRM.

featureCandidates.title: Nightly OPS: SLA Risk Radar and Focus Queue
featureCandidates.summary: Adds urgency/risk scoring for OPS tasks with execution summary and blocker-focused queue.
